components: context7-gateway — Bun HTTP wrapper around @upstash/context7-mcp, exposes /mcp on :3100
runner — Bun HTTP + MCP server on :3200, owns all agent tools
chromadb — vector database on :8000, used by runner for RAG
postgres — backing store for memory-service on :5432
rag-service — Go HTTP proxy for ChromaDB on :8081
memory-service — Go HTTP server backed by Postgres on :8082

adrs.title: Inline MCP runtime in runner (not separate mcp-server.ts)
Skill loading via whole-document registry, not RAG chunks
.agents/ mounted read-only into Docker for skill resolution
PRD_DIR explicit in compose so get_project_context resolves correctly
Namespace-isolated ChromaDB collections for RAG isolation
